metadata.name: iam-role-atomic
metadata.title: IAM Role
metadata.subtitle: Single IAM role resource
metadata.description: Create a standalone IAM role with assume role policy, managed policies, and inline policies. This is an atomic resource containing only the IAM role itself.
use_cases: Add IAM role to existing infrastructure
metadata.author: InnovativeApps

assumeRolePolicy.title: Assume Role Policy
assumeRolePolicy.description: The policy that grants an entity permission to assume the role (JSON string or PolicyDocument)

inlinePolicies.title: Inline Policies
inlinePolicies.description: List of inline policy documents to attach to the role

managedPolicyArns.title: Managed Policy ARNs
managedPolicyArns.description: Set of Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) of managed policies to attach

maxSessionDuration.title: Max Session Duration
maxSessionDuration.description: Maximum session duration (in seconds) for role sessions (3600-43200)

permissionsBoundary.title: Permissions Boundary
permissionsBoundary.description: ARN of the policy used to set the permissions boundary for the role

security.description: Implements security best practices for cloud infrastructure with network isolation, IAM roles, and secure access patterns.

reliability.description: Ensures high availability and fault tolerance.

performance_efficiency.description: Optimizes resource utilization and performance with scalable compute resources and efficient networking.

cost_optimization.description: Balances cost efficiency with reliability through appropriate resource sizing and usage-based pricing.

operational_excellence.description: Enables operational best practices with infrastructure as code, monitoring, and automated management.
best_practices: Infrastructure as Code with Pulumi for automated deployments

sustainability.description: Supports sustainable practices through efficient resource utilization and regional service usage.
